hero.tagline: Supporting Health & Advocacy for Middle Eastern Societies
hero.title: SHAMS: Health support for Middle Eastern and North African societies in Canada
hero.subtitle: We are a youth-led Canadian non-profit organization that provides health education, mentorship, and research opportunities.
mission.title: Our Mission
whatIsShams.title: What is SHAMS
whatIsShams.description: SHAMS stands for Support for Health Advocacy in Middle Eastern Societies. We are a youth-led Canadian non-profit organization focused on Canada. We collaborate globally when it helps our communities here.
whatWeDo.healthEducationDesc: Clear resources in English and Arabic for families and newcomers.
whatWeDo.mentorshipDesc: Guidance for students and early-career professionals.
whatWeDo.communityResearchDesc: Studies and opportunities that reflect community needs in Canada.
about.mission: Our mission is to support Middle Eastern and North African societies in Canada through practical health education, mentorship, and society-driven research. We build partnerships with clinicians, researchers, and community groups to make health information accessible and culturally grounded.
about.whySocietiesDesc: We serve people and families in real neighborhoods and networks. 'Societies' reflects the formal, organized nature of the groups we support. Our long form reads Support for Health Advocacy in Middle Eastern Societies.

resources.title: Resources
diseases.title: Common Diseases
diseases.subtitle: Educational resources about common health conditions affecting Middle Eastern communities, with culturally relevant information and support.
diseases.contextDescription: Health conditions can present differently across populations and may be influenced by genetic, environmental, and cultural factors. Our resources are designed to provide information that is relevant to Middle Eastern communities while acknowledging the diversity within these populations.
diseases.personalizedDescription: Contact our team of healthcare professionals for culturally sensitive support.
disease.diabetesDesc: Diabetes is a chronic condition that affects how your body processes blood sugar. Learn about risk factors in Middle Eastern populations, symptoms, management strategies, and cultural considerations for treatment.
disease.heartDiseaseDesc: Heart disease is a leading cause of mortality worldwide. Discover specific risk factors in Middle Eastern communities, prevention strategies, early warning signs, and culturally appropriate interventions.
disease.mentalHealthDesc: Mental health conditions affect millions globally but are often stigmatized in many communities. Explore common mental health challenges, cultural perspectives, and resources for support.
disease.respiratoryDesc: Respiratory diseases like asthma and COPD can significantly impact quality of life. Learn about prevalence in Middle Eastern populations, environmental factors, and management approaches.

webinars.subtitle: Access our library of educational workshops featuring expert insights on health topics relevant to Middle Eastern communities.
webinars.requestDesc: Is there a health topic you'd like us to cover in a future workshop? Let us know, and our medical experts will consider it for upcoming sessions.
